name: boilerplate
author: Proyecciones Digitales
description: A boilerplate for Electron + React + Vite applications

scripts.dev:headless:only: cross-env NODE_ENV=development HEADLESS=true node scripts/build-headless.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=development HEADLESS=true node dist/headless/main.js
scripts.transpile:electron: pnpm run clean:electron && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.transpile:headless: pnpm run clean:headless && pnpm run build:headless
scripts.dist:mac: pnpm run increment:version && pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run transpile:electron && pnpm run build:vite && electron-builder --mac --arm64
scripts.dist:win: pnpm run increment:version && pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run transpile:electron && pnpm run build:vite && electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.dist:linux: pnpm run increment:version && pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run transpile:electron && pnpm run build:vite && electron-builder --linux --x64
scripts.dist:headless: pnpm run increment:version && pnpm run clean:dist && pnpm run build:vite && cross-env NODE_ENV=production HEADLESS=true node build-headless.mjs && xcopy dist-ui dist\headless\dist-ui /E /I /Y
